title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・姫の戦いは

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Run, run.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Faster than anyone else! Like my true self!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Not for anybody else—just for me!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Kawakami Princess is first! She's claimed victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: RRRAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Incredible.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Haha! Scarlet, you look so stupid! Don't tell me...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You thought you were the one fit to be queen?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hit the nail on the head, huh? Ahaha.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You're the same as me, then.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sweep...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't able to win today. Kawakami is the
queen.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But I definitely won't lose next time.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right. I won't lose either.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Not to her... or any other veteran racers. I'll
surpass you all one day.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I really wanted Daiwa Scarlet to win...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But wasn't Kawakami's running just amazing?
Like, it looked really powerful, or something...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess! Would you tell us how you're
feeling after today's race?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
You defeated Daiwa Scarlet, who had entered
the race in place of Vodka, but—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Both she and I were running for ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Please don't get it twisted.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! I'm terribly sorry!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. I'd also like to express my gratitude to all
the fans out there who came to watch our race
today.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Thank you for everything up to this point.

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
P-Princess?! "Up to this point"? Don't tell me
you're going to stop racing...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What?! Stop racing? Me?!
choice_data_list: You don't intend to stop, right?
You don't intend to stop, right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Of course not! My battle is far from done.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"You aren't fit to enter a dignified and historic
race like the Queen Elizabeth II Cup. You never
were."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
However, I want to become the princess that I
envision for myself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I haven't finished showing everyone the type of
princess I am.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It would make me happy if the path I tread one
day serves as a model for someone else's future.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But regardless of whether that happens, I run for
my own sake.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There will be people who don't accept me as a
princess, but that's only because their idea of one
differs from my own.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
However, this is the princess that I am. I won't
stray from my path.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What's mine is mine. And I am proud to be the
way I am—exactly the kind of princess I want to
be.
